authentication-service.overview:
Standalone authentication service with JWT and role management.

Features to build:
• Register
• Login
• JWT
• BCrypt
• Role Management

Requirements:
• Spring Security
• JWT token generation & validation
• BCrypt password hashing
• USER and ADMIN roles

Bonus:
• Refresh token support
authentication-service.explanation: Authentication Service is a expert-level project (Week 9). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Register, Login, JWT, BCrypt, Role Management.
authentication-service.youtubeLabel: Spring Security Full Course — JWT & Auth
authentication-service.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

employee-portal.overview:
Employee portal with role-based dashboards and profile management.

Features to build:
• Login
• Profile
• Admin Dashboard
• Employee Dashboard
• Role-Based Access

Requirements:
• JWT authentication
• RBAC with @PreAuthorize
• Separate admin and employee endpoints

Bonus:
• Profile photo upload
employee-portal.explanation: Employee Portal is a expert-level project (Week 9). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Login, Profile, Admin Dashboard, Employee Dashboard, Role-Based Access.
employee-portal.youtubeLabel: Secure REST APIs with Spring Security

hospital-portal.overview:
Multi-role hospital portal with doctor, patient, and admin access.

Features to build:
• Doctor Login
• Patient Login
• Admin Login
• Appointment APIs
• JWT Authentication

Requirements:
• Multiple roles (DOCTOR, PATIENT, ADMIN)
• JWT-protected appointment APIs
• Spring Security

Bonus:
• Role-specific appointment views
hospital-portal.explanation: Hospital Portal is a expert-level project (Week 9). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Doctor Login, Patient Login, Admin Login, Appointment APIs, JWT Authentication.

ecommerce-auth.overview:
E-commerce authentication with customer and admin login flows.

Features to build:
• Customer Login
• Admin Login
• Password Reset
• Token Validation

Requirements:
• JWT authentication
• Customer and Admin roles
• Password reset flow

Bonus:
• Email verification on registration

student-portal.overview:
Student portal with faculty and admin access for courses and attendance.

Features to build:
• Student Login
• Faculty Login
• Admin Login
• Course APIs
• Attendance APIs

Requirements:
• Three roles (STUDENT, FACULTY, ADMIN)
• JWT-protected course and attendance APIs
• RBAC

Bonus:
• Attendance report for faculty
student-portal.explanation: Student Portal is a expert-level project (Week 9). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Student Login, Faculty Login, Admin Login, Course APIs, Attendance APIs.
